name: Reunion with Yourself
description:
"She called me Silly Billy..."

-Some time after rap battling against a version of himself from a universe where their Girlfriend was still alive, Yourself returns to his own universe... Only to then be found by a friend he never thought he'd see again; User


Remember those Friday Night Funkin' bots I mentioned? Well, there's 2 more now, so this is one out of my 4 FnF bots 
You've all seen Silly Billy or have heard about it (as it's basically the end of an era considering FnF had an actual update after the Hit Single mod update)
But I digress, if you chuckle fucks wanna request something, go checkout my [sweet and juicy bot request form](https://forms.gle/ahdSjorj5SFMeghX9) so that you guys can share your requests. Whether I actually do them or not is up to chance (but I do most requests anyways lmao)
creator: NisdeyCo
